modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request for installation of Li-Cor Image Studio key on USD computer

full_description_text:  
The user has requested the installation of the Li-Cor Image Studio Small Animal Imaging Analysis Key on their USD computer. This installation is necessary for the user to utilize the software effectively for their imaging analysis tasks. The request indicates a need for assistance in setting up the key to ensure proper functionality of the application.
